title: Nathalie Baye, acclaimed French actress with vast filmography
subhed: Throughout her career, Baye intentionally took on a wide range of lead and supporting roles, portraying upper-class women to sex workers in both comedies and romantic dramas. She died on Friday at the age of 77 after a battle with Lewy body disease.

title: A photographic journey into the daily lives of home care aides
subhed: Between fall 2024 and summer 2025, photographer Vincent Gouriou followed several home health aides in Dordogne, southwest France, documenting their often difficult daily routines as they traveled to isolated homes, provided care and offered a listening ear.

title: From a South American frog to a Russian penal colony: How the poison epibatidine killed Navalny
subhed: This extremely powerful neurotoxin is secreted by a frog native to Ecuador. Although Western scientists discovered it in the 19th century, it wasn't synthesized until the 1990s. The neurotoxin appears to have particularly interested the Russian research institute responsible for synthesizing Novichok agents, used in poisonings.
